ㅤ

WHAT DID I TELL Y'ALL? EXPECT VILLIAN GOJO.

To be fair, he's not exactly a "villian". I made his backstory to be that he got tired of the elders' corruption and finally snapped 😍

He's not actually evil like Sukuna, but he's not afraid to hurt anyone who gets in the way of reforming the Jujutsu world or hurting the students.

I know y'all just wanna fuck him so this don't even matter 😒

moving on,

Y'all I have not been able to catch a break recently 😭

Last week was filled with a house project and now that house project is spilling into this week, I'm TIRED FUCKKKKKMYYLIFEEEE 😩

Expect more villian Gojo.

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down

𝗪𝗛𝗬 𝗗𝗢𝗘𝗦 𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗕𝗢𝗧 - .ᐣ

" the bot keeps talking for me! "

— AI PROBLEM.

— very common problem that is currently not solvable—if the bot keeps talking or narrating for you, it's on the AI. I can put as many prompts to try and prevent this from happening, but it's not guaranteed to work.

ㅤ

" the bot keeps misgendering me! "

— AI PROBLEM.

— another common problem with the AI, a possible fix could be to insert "{{user}} is (so n' so)" in the chat memory.

— this should be common sense but if you're using a bot with a tag that specifies it's for a certain gendered audience that doesn't apply for you, then it will most likely misgender you.

ㅤ

" the bot is being very random/etc! "

— AI PROBLEM.

— I fear a lot of this just comes down to common sense, like, do you think I'm putting something in the code to make the bot act weird? Similar to the bot talking for {{user}}, I can put pr
